description: Style NoteThis summer is the season of mixing it up with fusion fashion - creations by mineral are spot on when it comes to that elusive cohesive combination of trends. This top is perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make head turn without losing her cool. Modern and innovative design details sets this piece above the rest. Product DescriptionGreen sleeveless top, has a round neckline, blue patterned binding around the neckline and armholes, ruffle detail below the neckline and smocking at the hemlineMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmTumble dry low Use warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
